error_signature: relation property not showing in dropdown
title: Notion relation property not appearing in n8n
symptom: The relation property of a Notion database does not appear in the dropdown list when trying to update a page using n8n.
applies_when: Trying to update a database page with a relation property
not_this_if: Relation property appears in the dropdown
root_cause: n8n requires relation properties to be two-way in order to be selectable. If the relation is one-way, it will not show up in the dropdown list for selection.
fix_steps: Change the relation property in Notion from one-way to two-way.
Ensure that both databases involved in the relation are connected to the n8n integration.
agent_instruction: Change the relation to two-way in Notion and verify both databases are connected to n8n.
safety_notes: Changing relation types may affect existing data relationships.
